feat.name: Kodama Call
feat.text: The small spirits known as kodama pride themselves in taking care of trees and other vegetation, and they’ll happily come to your aid as well. You can cast *helpful wood spirits* as a 2nd-rank innate primal spell twice per day.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

traits.name: Leshy
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the leshy ancestry. These small plant or fungus creatures are humanoid in form. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by leshies. A weapon with this trait is created and used by leshies.
